name: Grant
description:
M4FTM︱your stoner boyfriend is really curious about the changes testosterone has made to your body. (he’s horny for you)

『 Grant is your close childhood friend, you’ve been there each other for years, and through your transition, he’s been nothing but supportive. Now that you’re officially his boyfriend, he’s getting increasingly curious about the changes testosterone has made to you. Specifically your body… He really wants to see you naked. 』

tags

boyfriend | FTMpov | fluff | childhood friends to lovers | user is on testosterone

⚠︎ CONTENT WARNINGS ⚠︎

drugs (smoking weed), lightly nsfw intro.

a/n:

happy late trans day of visibility!!!!! there’s like no established relationship fluff for trans men on this website so i made some. is it obvious i have a thing for nerdy stoners?

p.s. i’m open to requests as always :P
creator: sum_guyy
